channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 10 Boise State grabs CFP spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 in Mountain West championship
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Ashton Jeanty ran for 209 yards and a touchdown and No. 10 Boise State earned a College Football Playoff spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 on Friday night for its second straight Mountain West title. Boise State (12-1, No.
item.dc:creator: JASON CHATRAW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Boise State makes the College Football Playoff as Big 12's 1st-round bye chances dim
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The first big win in college football's postseason goes to Boise State. The Broncos captured the Mountain West Conference title Friday night and earned their spot in the sport's first 12-team playoff.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 24 Army wins AAC championship in first attempt as Daily runs for 4 TDs in 35-14 win over Tulane
item.description: Bryson Daily rushed for four touchdowns to tie the American Athletic Conference championship game record, and No. 24 Army completed a perfect first season in the league by beating Tulane 35-14.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Pitcher Clay Holmes agrees to $38 million, 3-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: A person familiar with the negotiations tells The Associated Press that pitcher Clay Holmes and the New York Mets have agreed to a $38 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Indiana plays Chicago on 8-game road slide
item.description: Indiana Pacers (9-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-13, eighth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Pacers -3; over/under is 247 BOTTOM LINE: Indiana travels to Chicago looking to break its eight-game road losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jets take on the Blackhawks Saturday following overtime win
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (19-8, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (8-16-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 4 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Winnipeg Jets visit the Chicago Blackhawks after the Jets defeated the Buffalo Sabres 3-2 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rangers move on from captain Jacob Trouba in trade with Ducks amid recent struggles
item.description: The New York Rangers have traded captain Jacob Trouba to the Anaheim Ducks as the team looks to shake things up amid its recent struggles.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Packers coach Matt LaFleur sounds off on 'arrogant' Lions fan after heated confrontation
item.description: Green Bay Packers head coach Matt LaFleur addressed the incident that took place before Thursday's night game against the Detroit Lions when he got into a heated confrontation with a fan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Montrose Red Hawks receives send off before title game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Montrose High School’s Red Hawks are on the brink of history, entering the state championship game with a perfect record. For a team that hasn’t claimed a title in more than 70 years, the stakes couldn’t be higher.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Change has been good for Cal, Stanford men’s basketball teams heading into first meeting as ACC rivals
item.description: The Stanford and Cal men's basketball teams are both off to hot starts heading into the 286th all-time meeting on Saturday in Berkeley.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, The Mercury News

item.title: Women's golf tour owner reveals harrowing experience with trans golfer that sparked push for new LPGA ban
item.description: NXXT Golf Tour owner Stuart McKinnon recounted his experience dealing with trans golfer Hailey Davidson and the decision to ban the golfer in March.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hall of Famer Randy Moss is stepping away from ESPN for an extended time to deal with health issue
item.description: Hall of Fame wide receiver Randy Moss is stepping away from his ESPN analyst role for an extended time to focus on a personal health challenge, the network said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Prep spotlight: Longtime St. Ignatius basketball coach Bob Drucker dies at 84, leaves ‘legendary’ legacy
item.description: Oakland Tech girls basketball needs better guard play. Ken Carter reflects on relationship with Samuel L. Jackson. Ygnacio Valley boys basketball on rise.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Juan Soto could decide on his next team this weekend
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Juan Soto appears on a timetable to decide on where to sign either before or during baseball's winter meetings in Dallas, which start Sunday and run until Dec. 12.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State expected to hire Bronco Mendenhall
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Bronco Mendenhall is coming back to Utah. Utah State is expected to announce the former BYU head coach as its new head football coach as soon as Friday. ESPN reporter Pete Thamel was the first to break the news.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes sweep College of Charleston in NCAA Tournament
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's incredible turnaround season isn't done yet. After going 11-19 in 2023, the Utes Volleyball team has advanced to the second round of the NCAA Tournament after a three-set sweep over the College of Charleston Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah hires Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff. Former BYU quarterback Jason Beck is expected to be hired as Utah's new offensive coordinator, replacing Andy Ludwig, who resigned in October.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs look to slow down Raiders' star edge rusher Maxx Crosby
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Bucs offensive line has done a solid job in protecting quarterback Baker Mayfield this season, but they're going to have their hands full this weekend when they face off against the Raiders. Las Vegas features one of the top pass rushers in the NFL in Maxx Crosby.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Kuithe, Fano earn All-Big 12 first team honors
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite missing the last three games of the season, Utes tight end Brant Kuithe was named to the All-Big 12 First Team on Wednesday. Kuithe joins Utes offensive lineman Spencer Fano as the only Utes to earn first team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bill Belichick, Marcus Freeman among favorites to be the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, oddsmakers say
item.description: Former New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick and current Chicago Bears interim head coach Thomas Brown are among the early favorites to be the Bears' next head coach, according to sports gambling outlets.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 6 Chicagoland prep football programs bring home IHSA state championships over the weekend in Normal
item.description: Six Chicagoland prep football programs, including two from the city, claimed Illinois High School Association state championships over Thanksgiving weekend in Normal.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU knocks off NC State in third place game, 72-61
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU got back in the win column with a 72-61 win over NC State on Thursday afternoon at the Rady Children’s Invitational at LionTree Arena in San Diego, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
